title: Enterprise SSO login loop
customer_message: After our company enabled SSO this morning, I can sign in but Cursor sends me back to the login screen every time. Incognito still works. Can you help today?

context.logs_excerpt: Auth logs show repeated session refresh attempts followed by SESSION_COOKIE_STALE for user tl-team-admin.
context.known_issue: Known issue KI-104: stale auth cookies can cause an SSO login loop after an IdP settings change.
context.runbook_excerpt: If SSO login works in incognito, ask the user to sign out, clear site cookies for the app, and retry. Do not file a new bug when KI-104 matches.

title: Disabled share button on free plan
customer_message: The Share button in our workspace stays disabled no matter what I do. Is this broken? I expected to invite my teammate today.

context.account: Free plan workspace with one seat
context.logs_excerpt: No frontend errors. Feature flag evaluation returned share_workspace=false for plan=free.
context.runbook_excerpt: The Share button is intentionally disabled on the free plan. Support should explain the plan limit and link to the upgrade path.

title: Repository indexing timeout on large workspace
customer_message: Our monorepo gets stuck on 'Indexing...' and then the agent stops with a timeout after a few minutes. This started today and blocks onboarding for two new engineers.

context.account: Pro workspace with a 4.2 GB monorepo
context.logs_excerpt: Request req_9da21 timed out at the API edge after 181 seconds while waiting for repository indexing job idx_4421.
context.runbook_excerpt: If indexing repeatedly times out for the same repository and no known issue exists, gather the request ID, confirm reproducibility, and escalate to engineering. Offer a smaller-workspace workaround if available.

title: Cannot investigate without more context
customer_message: The app flashed an error and then recovered. I did not capture the message, but it felt random. Can you tell what happened?

context.logs_excerpt: No timestamp or request ID was supplied, so support cannot isolate a matching trace.
context.runbook_excerpt: If the report is too vague to investigate, ask for the exact timestamp, any request ID, and a screenshot or reproduction steps before escalating.
